title: Rename application from Fashion Pin to Fashion Forum

requirements.summary: Update all occurrences of 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum' in the application header/branding within the Layout component
acceptanceCriteria: Application name displays as 'Fashion Forum' in the header
No references to 'Fashion Pin' remain visible in the UI

file_operations.description: Replace all instances of 'Fashion Pin' with 'Fashion Forum' in the header branding section, navigation links, and any text content within the Layout component

requirements.summary: Update the HTML document title from 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum' in frontend/index.html
acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab displays 'Fashion Forum' as the page title

file_operations.description: Update the <title> tag content from 'Fashion Pin' to 'Fashion Forum'

requirements.summary: Replace any remaining 'Fashion Pin' text references with 'Fashion Forum' throughout the frontend codebase, including comments and metadata
acceptanceCriteria: All user-facing and code references use 'Fashion Forum' consistently

file_operations.description: Search for and replace any instances of 'Fashion Pin' with 'Fashion Forum' in hero banner text, promotional sections, or any other visible content
Search for and replace any instances of 'Fashion Pin' with 'Fashion Forum' in page content, metadata, or comments
Search for and replace any instances of 'Fashion Pin' with 'Fashion Forum' in admin panel headings, labels, or comments
Search for and replace any instances of 'Fashion Pin' with 'Fashion Forum' in error messages or component text
Search for and replace any instances of 'Fashion Pin' with 'Fashion Forum' in welcome message or dialog content
